testcase.classname: Finding Doctors Near You on Practo
testcase.name: Find doctors by clicking Find Doctors Near You and display their names and experience
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Practo home page..........................................passed When I click on "Find Doctors Near You" card on the home page...............passed Then the doctors listing page should load...................................passed When I search for "Dermatologist" in the search box and submit..............passed Then the doctor results page should load with doctor cards..................passed When I collect the top 10 doctor details....................................passed Then I display the names and experience of all collected doctors............passed

testcase.name: Find hospitals that are Open 24x7, have Parking and Rating above 3.5
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Practo home page..........................................passed When I search for hospitals in "Bangalore"..................................passed Then the hospital listing page should load..................................passed When I collect the top 20 hospital links....................................passed Then I visit each hospital and filter by Open 24x7, Parking facility, and Rating above 3.5.passed And I display the names of all matching hospitals...........................passed
